steps.t: Uxi is in the Chamber of the Cross-roads in Durin's Way. You should return to Uxi, for you have gathered all of the missing pieces of the statue of He…
The shattered statue is in the centre of the court, within view of Uxi. Uxi instructed you to take the mortar to the shattered statue and put it back …
Uxi is in the Chamber of the Cross-roads. You should return to Uxi to celebrate the statue's reassembly.
